assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 18-24: All 7 rows in the version impact table show 'NO' in the Affected? column. Specifically: 2.1.0 (serde_json 1.0.137, NO), 2.1.1 (serde_json 1.0.137, NO), 2.2.0 (serde_json 1.0.138, NO), 2.2.1 (serde_json 1.0.138, NO), 2.2.2 (—, NO, retag of 2.2.1), 2.2.3 (serde_json 1.0.139, NO), 2.2.4 (serde_json 1.0.139, NO). All shipped versions are >= 1.0.135, outside the affected range (< 1.0.135).

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 7 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 3: 'Decision: Case C — No Supported Versions Affected (Close as Not a Bug)'. Line 72: 'jira.transition_issue("TC-8002", status="Closed", resolution="Not a Bug")'. Lines 132-138 explicitly state 'No Remediation Tasks Needed' and '7 (Case A/B) | Remediation Task Creation | Not applicable | No versions are affected'.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 50-68: The proposed close comment (under '#### 2. Close as Not a Bug') contains a full version impact table listing all 7 versions with their serde_json versions and Affected? status (NO for all), e.g., '| 2.2.x  | 2.2.0   | v0.4.5  | 1.0.138 | NO |', followed by the statement 'All supported versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.135, which is outside the affected range (< 1.0.135).'.

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 7 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 14: 'VEX Justification custom field | customfield_12345' — the field is configured. triage-outcome.md lines 75-90: Section '#### 3. Set VEX Justification' proposes 'Component not Present' with the Jira call 'jira.edit_issue("TC-8002", fields={"customfield_12345": "Component not Present"})'.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 7 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 134-138: Explicit section 'No Remediation Tasks Needed' states 'Since no supported versions ship a vulnerable version of serde_json, no remediation tasks are required.' The steps table on line 132 marks 'Remediation Task Creation | Not applicable | No versions are affected'. No remediation, backport, or downstream propagation tasks appear anywhere in the output files.
